_note: This is a static fallback copy. The live, always-current version is served (unauthenticated) at https://YOUR_PROBABLY_HOST/.well-known/mcp-client-config — fetch that to get the real base URL and current tool list. Replace YOUR_PROBABLY_HOST below with your Probably MCP host.

tools.name: get_spending_summary
tools.description: Get a summary of spending by category and time period.

tools.name: get_account_balances
tools.description: Get current account balances, net worth, assets, and liabilities.

tools.name: ask_question
tools.description: Ask a natural-language question about your finances and get an AI-powered answer.

tools.name: get_recurring_patterns
tools.description: Get recurring transactions and subscription patterns.

tools.name: get_financial_overview
tools.description: Get a full financial overview combining balances and recent activity.
